title: Slow execution of COUNT in combination with DISTINCT
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE facts (subject VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, predicate VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, object TEXT, PRIMARY KEY (subject, predicate));
INSERT INTO facts (subject, predicate, object) VALUES ('subj1', 'pred1', 'obj1');
INSERT INTO facts (subject, predicate, object) VALUES ('subj2', 'pred2', NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT(predicate) FROM facts WHERE object IS NOT NULL) AS b;
key_bug_features: COUNT with DISTINCT on large datasets
